hero.title: Lapacho – Simple by nature.
hero.subtitle: Clear, fast orders with no mistakes. All through WhatsApp.

what.title: What is Lapacho?
what.p1: Lapacho is an automated assistant that takes orders via WhatsApp, organizes them, and sends them ready to prepare.
what.p2: No need to install anything or learn new tools.
what.p3: Your business works the same, but without the chaos.

simplicity.title: Total simplicity
items: No need to change how you work

time.title: Real time savings
items: The system builds the complete order

single.title: One WhatsApp number
single.desc: All stores in one place, no searching for phone numbers.

fast.title: Fast and simple ordering
fast.desc: The bot builds your order in seconds, hassle-free.

tracking.title: Automatic tracking
tracking.desc: Notifications: received, preparing, ready, on the way.

how.title: How it works
steps: The store receives the order on WhatsApp
Updates the status with one click

cta.title: Simplify your business today.
cta.subtitle: Less chat. Fewer errors. More time to grow.

terminos.title: Terms & Conditions
terminos.s1_text: By accessing and using the Lapacho service ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you may not access the Service.
terminos.s2_text: Lapacho is an automated assistant that facilitates order taking via WhatsApp for local businesses. The Service acts as a technological intermediary between customers and affiliated businesses.
s3_items: Not use the Service for illegal or unauthorized purposes
Not interfere with the normal operation of the Service
terminos.s4_intro: Businesses using Lapacho are responsible for:
s4_items: Keeping their product catalog and prices up to date
Fulfilling orders received through the platform
Guaranteeing the quality of their products and services
Complying with local regulations applicable to their activity
terminos.s5_intro: Lapacho acts solely as a technological intermediary. We are not responsible for:
s5_items: The quality, safety or legality of products offered by businesses
Service interruptions due to causes beyond our control
terminos.s6_text: All content of the Service, including but not limited to texts, graphics, logos, icons, images and software, is the property of Lapacho or its licensors and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
terminos.s7_text: We reserve the right to modify these Terms and Conditions at any time. Changes will take effect upon publication on the website. Continued use of the Service implies acceptance of the modified terms.
terminos.s8_text: We may suspend or terminate your access to the Service at any time, without prior notice, if we believe you have violated these Terms and Conditions or for any other reason we deem appropriate.
terminos.s9_text: These Terms and Conditions shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Argentine Republic, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
terminos.s10_text: If you have questions about these Terms and Conditions, you can contact us at:

privacidad.title: Privacy Policy
privacidad.s1_text: At Lapacho we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose and protect your information when you use our service.
privacidad.s2_intro: We may collect the following types of information:
s3_items: Communicate with you about order status
Improve our service and user experience
Send relevant notifications about your order
privacidad.s4_intro: We may share your information with:
privacidad.s4_business_desc: We share the information necessary for the preparation and delivery of your order
privacidad.s4_providers_desc: Third parties that help us operate the service
privacidad.s4_authorities_desc: When required by law or to protect our rights
privacidad.s4_no_sell: We do not sell or rent your personal information to third parties for marketing purposes.
privacidad.s5_text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure or destruction.
privacidad.s6_text: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy, unless the law requires or permits a longer retention period.
s7_items: Object to processing of your data
privacidad.s7_exercise: To exercise these rights, contact us at contacto@lapacho.ar
privacidad.s8_text: Our website may use cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience. You can configure your browser to reject cookies, although this may affect some functionalities.
privacidad.s9_text: Our service is not intended for minors under 18 years of age. We do not intentionally collect personal information from minors. If we discover that we have collected information from a minor, we will take steps to delete that information.
privacidad.s10_text: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify you of significant changes by posting the new policy on our website and updating the "last updated" date.
privacidad.s11_text: If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, you can contact us at:

contacto.title: Contact
contacto.subtitle: Do you have a question or want more information? We're here to help.
contacto.messageSentDesc: We'll get back to you soon.
contacto.whatsappDesc: Write to us directly on WhatsApp for a faster response.
contacto.emailDesc: For formal inquiries or detailed information.
contacto.responseTime: We respond to all inquiries within a maximum of 24 business hours.

ayuda.welcomeDesc: Your smart assistant for placing orders via WhatsApp quickly and easily
quickStartSteps: Save our WhatsApp number in your contacts: +14155238886
Send the message "join" to activate the bot (first time only)
Type "menu" or "start" to see available options

faq.order_q: How do I place an order?
faq.order_a_intro: To place an order you can:
order_a_items: Type "Place order" or choose option 3 from the menu
The bot will show you available stores
Select the store and the products you want
The bot will process your order and give you a tracking code
commands_items: menu or start - Go back to main menu
see stores - List of available restaurants and businesses
talk to vendor - Connect with a human
cancel - Cancel current order and go back to start
faq.delivery_a_note: The exact time depends on the distance and order load. You'll receive real-time updates on your order status.
faq.zones_q: What areas do you deliver to?
faq.zones_a: We currently deliver throughout the city and nearby areas. The bot will automatically tell you if your address is within the coverage area when you place your order.
faq.payment_q: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.payment_a_intro: We accept the following payment methods:
faq.payment_a_note: The payment method is coordinated with the vendor before confirming the order.
faq.cancel_q: Can I modify or cancel an order?
faq.cancel_a1: Yes, you can cancel your order by typing "cancel" while it's in "Pending" or "Confirmed" status.
faq.cancel_a2: Once the order is "In preparation" or "On the way", you must talk to the vendor to coordinate changes by typing "talk to vendor".
faq.human_q: How do I talk to a real person?
faq.human_a_intro: At any time you can type phrases like:
faq.human_a_note: A vendor will continue the conversation with you. To return to the bot, the vendor can type "bot continue".
faq.natural_q: Does the bot understand natural language orders?
faq.natural_a_intro: Yes, our bot is designed to understand naturally written orders. For example, you can write:
faq.natural_a_note: The bot will identify the product type and show you the available stores.

ayuda.moreHelpDesc: If you have a question that isn't answered here, don't hesitate to contact us:
ayuda.assistanceHint: Type "talk to vendor" in the chat for personalized assistance

brandAssets.title: Brand Assets
correctItems: Leave enough space around the logo
Use light theme on light backgrounds
Use dark theme on dark backgrounds
avoidItems: Add effects like shadows or glows
Use on backgrounds that reduce legibility
